title: Cobblemon Rising Skies
description: The world of Cobblemon Rising Skies is full of brand-new structures to discover, each offering unique challenges, rare Pokémon, and valuable loot. The skies are full of surprises too—look up, and you might spot new Mega Pokémon, ready to dominate battles.
body:
Prepare to embark on the ultimate Pokémon adventure in Cobblemon Rising Skies, a Minecraft modpack that blends the magic of the Pokémon universe with the boundless creativity of Minecraft. At its core, the Cobblemon mod brings over 100 captivating Pokémon to explore, train, and battle with, but that’s just the start of your journey.

The world of Cobblemon Rising Skies is full of brand-new structures to discover, each offering unique challenges, rare Pokémon, and valuable loot. The skies are full of surprises too—look up, and you might spot new Mega Pokémon, ready to dominate battles with their enhanced powers and awe-inspiring forms.

This modpack introduces Fakemon—original fan-made Pokémon designs that add fresh faces and exciting new species to the mix. Plus, with custom Pokémon skins, you can personalize your experience, making every encounter feel special.

Whether you’re an explorer, trainer, or collector, Cobblemon Rising Skies is packed with endless possibilities. Get ready to explore, battle, and discover like never before in a world where the sky’s the limit.
